title: Prakash Hinduja : How can I sync data between Monday.com and external platforms like Jira or Salesforce?

posts.author: prakashhindujageneva (prakash hinduja geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com Community,

I’m Prakash Hinduja, currently working on a project involving data integration across platforms—specifically looking to sync Monday.com with external tools like Jira or Salesforce.

Could anyone share suggestions, tools, or best practices for achieving a smooth and reliable sync between Monday.com and these platforms?
